20 Minutes Till Dawn

Survive for 20 minutes against endless waves of monsters! Control a hero who automatically fires at enemies. Dodge attacks, collect experience gems from defeated foes, and choose powerful upgrades every few levels. Build your character strategically to handle increasingly dangerous enemy hordes. Your health is precious—if it reaches zero, the run ends immediately!

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move | Space: Dash (with cooldown) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart

TEST_4.test_description: Dash mechanic test. Validates dash ability cooldown, invulnerability frames, and movement.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Repeatedly use dash ability to test cooldown timing. Intentionally dash through enemies to verify invulnerability frames. Test dash in all movement directions.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Dash moves player quickly, provides brief invulnerability, has appropriate cooldown, and can be used in all directions. No damage taken during dash invulnerability.
